languages.text: "Едва ли это удастся. Я чувствую, что их обуревает ярость Кхейна — крови суждено пролиться".
"I doubt I would succeed if I tried. I feel Khaine's rage is consuming them — blood is bound to be spilt."
languages.original_text: "Едва ли это удастся. Я чувствую, что их обуревает ярость Кхейна — крови суждено пролиться".

traits.locale_text: "Success is unlikely. "I feel Khaine's rage is consuming them — blood is bound to be spilt."
"Success is unlikely. I feel Khaine's rage is consuming them — blood is bound to be spilt."
"Success is unlikely. Against the prophecy that brought them here, my words are dust."
"Success is unlikely. "I feel Khaine's rage is consuming them — blood is bound to be spilt."
"Success is unlikely. I feel Khaine's rage is consuming them — blood is bound to be spilt."
"I doubt I would succeed if I tried. I feel Khaine's rage is consuming them — blood is bound to be spilt."

languages.text: 「成功は難しい。この場所へ導いた予言に反して、私の言葉は塵に過ぎない」
languages.original_text: "Success is unlikely. Against the prophecy that brought them here, my words are dust."

languages.text: "Denesem de başarılı olacağımdan şüpheliyim. Khaine'in öfkesinin onları tükettiğini hissediyorum. Kan dökülmesi kaçınılmaz."
languages.original_text: "I doubt I would succeed if I tried. I feel Khaine's rage is consuming them — blood is bound to be spilt."

traits.locale_text: "Denesem de başarılı olacağımdan şüpheliyim. Khaine'in öfkesinin onları tükettiğini hissediyorum. Kan dökülmesi kaçınılmaz."

languages.text: “恐怕就算我出手，也未必能够阻止他们。我能感觉到凯恩之怒正在吞噬他们——流血在所难免。”
languages.original_text: "I doubt I would succeed if I tried. I feel Khaine's rage is consuming them — blood is bound to be spilt."

traits.locale_text: “恐怕就算我出手，也未必能够阻止他们。我能感觉到凯恩之怒正在吞噬他们——流血在所难免。”

languages.text: "Ich bezweifle, dass ich erfolgreich wäre. Ich spüre, wie Khaines Zorn sie verzehrt ... es wird Blut vergossen werden."
languages.original_text: "I doubt I would succeed if I tried. I feel Khaine's rage is consuming them — blood is bound to be spilt."

traits.locale_text: "Ich bezweifle, dass ich erfolgreich wäre. Ich spüre, wie Khaines Zorn sie verzehrt ... es wird Blut vergossen werden."

languages.text: « Je ne pense pas que j'y parviendrais. La rage de Khaine les submerge... Ce sera un véritable massacre. »
languages.original_text: "I doubt I would succeed if I tried. I feel Khaine's rage is consuming them — blood is bound to be spilt."

traits.locale_text: « Je ne pense pas que j'y parviendrais. La rage de Khaine les submerge... Ce sera un véritable massacre. »

languages.text: «Dudo que lo consiguiera si lo intentara. Siento que la ira de Khaine los consume. Se derramará sangre».
languages.original_text: "I doubt I would succeed if I tried. I feel Khaine's rage is consuming them — blood is bound to be spilt."

traits.locale_text: «Dudo que lo consiguiera si lo intentara. Siento que la ira de Khaine los consume. Se derramará sangre».
